deprecation_policy: Breaking changes ship under a new URL version with at least 90 days of notice.

endpoints.description: Calculate PAYE salary tax for supported African countries.
Read PAYE and VAT reference rates by country.
Read latest and historical FX rates.
Read latest fuel prices by country or region.
Read central bank, inflation, and policy-rate reference data.
Calculate VAT add-or-extract scenarios for supported African countries.
Read country metadata and available API products.
Route a partner user task to a validated AfroTools tool or AI workflow link.
Normalize and compare two job offers using only submitted compensation, terms, and FX rates.
Screen submitted vacancy details for explainable warning signs without opening supplied links.
